{{Quote|You just run, Elrod. You'll be safe. I'll come back for you...|Elrod's owner|<ref name="Hide in Plain Sight" />}}
'''Elrod''' was the pet of a Human civilian on the planet Nadiem. 

==Biography==
The [[eopi]] Elrod was the pet of a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Elrod's owner|civilian]] who lived on<ref name="Hide in Plain Sight" /> the remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE Nadiem">{{CSWECite|II|355|Nadiem}}</ref> [[Nadiem/Legends|Nadiem]].<ref name="Hide in Plain Sight" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="HideDate">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' dates the events of "[[Hide in Plain Sight]]," which depicts the [[Battle of Nadiem]], to twenty-two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to those of {{Film|IV}}, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> five months into the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] conflict<ref name="CSWE Nadiem" /> between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Nadiem was [[Battle of Nadiem|attacked]]. The civilians of the world were evacuated by the Republic as the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], invaded the planet. Elrod and his owner were in the process of evacuating into a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|Low Altitude Assault Transport]] from a settlement, when the [[Mirialan/Legends|Mirialan]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]] instructed the civilians to leave their belongings behind, as they did not have space.<ref name="Hide in Plain Sight" />

Elrod's owner inquired to Unduli why he should leave the eopi behind, as he considered him family. The Jedi explained that Elrod would take up the space of three people and asked him which of his neighbors should be denied passage. With no response to Unduli, Elrod's owner instructed him to run away, told the eopi that he would be safe and said that he would look for him. Elrod gave a grunt and left.<ref name="Hide in Plain Sight" />

==Personality and traits==
Elrod had [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and green skin. His owner considered him to be apart of his family.<ref name="Hide in Plain Sight" />

==Equipment==
During the evacuation of his owner's settlement, the eopi wore a leash around his neck which his owner held.<ref name="Hide in Plain Sight" />

==Appearances==
